response.step_by_step_log: Step 1: Identified on-screen text for both songs. 'SUNDAY NIGHT MAGIC' was identified as a Kobo Kanaeru song. '蜜月アン・ドゥ・トロワ' was identified as a song by DATEKEN. Step 3: Searched for 'SUNDAY NIGHT MAGIC' Hololive lyrics, no direct results found, likely a new/event-exclusive song. Searched for '蜜月アン・ドゥ・トロワ' DATEKEN Japanese and English lyrics and retrieved results.
response.global_summary: The video is a segment from a 3D concert event featuring Hololive members, Kobo Kanaeru, Shishiro Botan, Oozora Subaru, Akai Haato, and Hakui Koyori. It includes performances of two songs with a dialogue-heavy intermission in between.

scenes.description: Three characters (Kobo Kanaeru, Shishiro Botan, and Oozora Subaru) perform a song titled "SUNDAY NIGHT MAGIC" on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Shishiro Botan, Oozora Subaru

scenes.description: Dialogue interval featuring Kobo Kanaeru, Akai Haato, and Hakui Koyori.
Three characters (Kobo Kanaeru, Akai Haato, and Hakui Koyori) perform "蜜月アン・ドゥ・トロワ" (Mitsuketsu An-Deux-Trois) on stage. On-screen text indicates Lyrics/Music by DATEKEN.
scenes.song_title: 蜜月アン・ドゥ・トロワ
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Akai Haato, Hakui Koyori
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
誰も居なくなった
二人だけの街に
機械仕掛けの時計が
夜の訪れ知らせる
夕闇が空を
ワイン色に染めて
不慣れな二人

(Lyrics continue)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
There’s nobody left
In this town of only two of us
A mechanical clock
Announces the arrival of the night
Twilight dyes the sky
In the color of wine
We, two inexperienced

(Translation follows original Japanese structure)
